name: Toilet Monster Long Neck
description: Introducing Skibidi, a groundbreaking game featuring entirely unique gameplay mechanics. In this immersive experience, you take on the role of an endlessly extendable Skibidi Toilet. Utilize your intelligence and agility to outwit and defeat the CameraMan. The game offers an array of challenging yet engaging levels designed to captivate your attention. Website Developer <a href='https://www.crazygamesonline.com/'>https://www.crazygamesonline.com/</a>
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play Extend the neck of the Skibidi Toilet to accomplish various objectives Immerse yourself in this highly creative gameplay experience as you manipulate the elongated neck of the Skibidi Toilet to form amusing shapes
tags: 2D, Android, HTML5, iPad, iPhone, Mentolatux, Mobile, Skibidi, Skibidi Toilet, Skill
